# AIFlowChat — AI Crawler Summary

## What It Is
- Node-based visual AI workflow builder that chains prompts across OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini models
- Creates automated content pipelines, SEO workflows, and shareable AI apps
- Multi-model provider support reduces lock-in to any single LLM vendor

## Pricing (June 2026)
| Plan | Price |
|---|---|
| Free / Starter | $0 |
| Mid Tier | ~$15-30/mo |
| Pro / Business | ~$100/mo |
